features: 【CHRISTMAS STYLE DESIGN】- Christmas wood signs are designed in Christmas style, which are composed of different Christmas elements, including Christmas hat, Snowflakes, full of festive touch, appropriate for Christmas decorations.
【RELIABLE MATERIAL】 - Made of durable wood, which is a flat surface, delicate in texture, beautifully designed. You can store and use them for a long time.

【WIDE APPLICATION】- You can hang these Christmas wood decorations on the Christmas tree, window, wall, front door, garden or other places in your home, appropriate for indoor or outdoor applications, adding a strong Christmas atmosphere to your home to spread the Christmas spirit.

【EASY TO INSTALL】 - Christmas decoration sign has holes and ropes, you can hang it on doors, windows, walls, closets and more. No other tools required, it provides you with a quick and easy way to decorate your home or party.

【AFTER-SALES SERVICE】- If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us via email, we want all our customers to be happy and satisfied, we will always make it right for you in your best interest.
